raw_consumer_statement:
I rented a XXXX truck from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX at the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX location on XXXX returning XXXX. I then noticed on XXXX that my Citi ( XXXX ) credit card posted a rental charge of {$160.00}. I sent the attached XXXX XXXX E-mail.pdf to XXXX asking to explain the additional {$78.00} charge. XXXX did not respond to my e-mail and never sent a revised transaction receipt. The XXXX e-mail with the Internet link to the transaction receipt is the only bill I have for attached XXXX Contract # XXXX. 

I filed a credit card complaint disputing the additional {$78.00} charge, but the attached Citi Investigation Summary.jpg favored XXXX. My further investigation found that XXXX sent the revised transaction receipt to Citi per attached XXXX Attachment 1.pdf calculating additional mileage. I never received this revised transaction receipt. 

I requested Citi to re-open Case ID XXXX on XXXX considering my appeal that XXXXXXXX never responded to my XXXX e-mail or sent a revised transaction receipt explaining the additional charges. I should not be responsible for paying the additional {$78.00} charge because of XXXX 's lack of formal communication. 

Please see accompanying attachments for further details. 

Regards, XXXX Attachments ( 4 )
